raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Prior authorizations create delays in providing necessary care for patients, which can have severe and life-altering consequences during a mental health crisis.",
    "94 percent of doctors reported delays in providing necessary care for patients due to prior authorizations, according to a survey by the American Medical Association.",
    "On average, doctors complete 43 prior authorizations per physician, per week.",
    "California is experiencing a mental health crisis, with behavioral health diagnoses making up approximately one-third of all inpatient hospitalizations.",
    "California has experienced a 40 percent spike in hospitalizations for young people with mental health emergencies over the last decade.",
    "The most frequently requested treatments or services by insurers requiring prior authorizations include behavioral health services, mental health services, therapy, psychological tests and evaluation services, and referrals for psychiatry.",
    "Nearly every insurance company requires clinicians to obtain a prior authorization to provide coverage for inpatient psychiatric hospitalizations, according to the Health Affairs Journal.",
    "Requiring prior authorizations adds significant time to emergency department stays, potentially putting the patient's safety at risk during a mental health emergency."
  ]
}
```
